commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dfde965993c5f971ceffff22b9226d33ea133d6c)
commands.review_summary:
Adds Policy plugin support for additive `scopes.agents.<agentId>` overlays for `tools` and `agents.workspace`, plus docs, shape validation, `tools.alsoAllow.expected` findings, and focused doctor tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new Policy plugin capability rather than a reported bug. The PR body provides focused after-patch command proof, and source review confirms the current evidence surfaces needed for scoped matching exist on main.
commands.review_followup: The next action is maintainer approval of a protected Policy plugin/security-boundary contract; the only mechanical follow-up is a small docs-row addition.

target.title: Policy: add agent-scoped policy overlays
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
